event.description: The Docker container requests the `NET_RAW` capability, either explicitly or by default, granting access to the host's network interfaces.
Explicitly remove the `NET_RAW` capability by adding either `NET_RAW` or `ALL` to the `cap_drop` list and avoiding the `NET_RAW` capability in the `cap_add` list.

typePropertiesGroup.type: Container requests ability to craft raw network packets
typePropertiesGroup.longDescription: The Docker container requests the `NET_RAW` capability, either explicitly or by default, granting access to the host's network interfaces.

event.description: The Docker container requests the `NET_RAW` capability, either explicitly or by default, granting access to the host's network interfaces.
Explicitly remove the `NET_RAW` capability by adding either `NET_RAW` or `ALL` to the `cap_drop` list and avoiding the `NET_RAW` capability in the `cap_add` list.

typePropertiesGroup.type: Container requests ability to craft raw network packets
typePropertiesGroup.longDescription: The Docker container requests the `NET_RAW` capability, either explicitly or by default, granting access to the host's network interfaces.
